entries.title: Subscribers admin index.
entries.notes: Shows subscriber status, site scope, consent-related columns, filters, and table actions.
entries.useCase: A marketer reviews subscriber status, consent, site scope, tags, and filters.

entries.title: Create/edit subscriber form.
entries.notes: Capture subscriber identity, status, site, tags, and consent-related fields.
entries.useCase: A marketer edits subscriber identity, status, site, tags, and consent-related fields.

entries.title: Provider connections admin index and form.
entries.useCase: An operator configures a newsletter provider connection using demo-safe credentials.

entries.title: Provider audiences admin index and form.
entries.notes: Shows mapping between local sites and remote provider audiences.
entries.useCase: An operator maps local sites to provider audiences.

entries.title: Provider interest mappings admin index and form.
entries.notes: Shows remote interests mapped to local newsletter tags.
entries.useCase: An operator maps remote provider interests to local newsletter tags.

entries.title: Form mappings admin index and form.
entries.notes: Requires form-builder hard dependency and a seeded form.
entries.useCase: A marketer maps a seeded form-builder form into newsletter subscription handling.

entries.title: Newsletter tags admin index and form.
entries.useCase: A marketer manages package-owned newsletter tags.

entries.title: Segments admin index and form.
entries.notes: Shows static and dynamic segment configuration.
entries.useCase: A marketer configures static or dynamic subscriber segments.

entries.title: Import batches admin index.
entries.useCase: An operator reviews seeded import batch state and import outcomes.

entries.title: Sync attempts admin index.
entries.notes: Shows provider sync state, retry status, and failure handling.
entries.useCase: An operator reviews provider sync attempts, retries, and failures.

entries.title: Newsletter overview stats.
entries.notes: Capture dashboard stats for subscribed, pending, and sync failures.
entries.useCase: A marketer checks subscribed, pending, and sync-failure dashboard stats.

entries.title: Subscription confirmation route response.
entries.notes: Use a disposable valid token and verify no admin/provider internals are exposed.
entries.useCase: A subscriber confirms a disposable newsletter token through the public route.

entries.title: Unsubscribe route response.
entries.notes: Use a disposable valid token and verify no admin/provider internals are exposed.
entries.useCase: A subscriber unsubscribes through a disposable public token without seeing provider internals.
